validate.description: Run the repository validation pipeline used before merge to main.
outputs: Repository validation result across syntax, YAML, Ansible lint, shell, JSON, canonical data-model, and generated-document checks.

generate-status-docs.description: Regenerate the README status fragments that are derived from canonical repository state.
outputs: Generated README platform status, control-plane lane summary, version summary, document index, and merged-workstream sections refreshed from canonical repository state.

install-proxmox.description: Install Proxmox VE on the Debian host from the repo-managed package path.
outputs: Proxmox package repositories and core platform packages converged on the host.

configure-network.description: Converge the host bridge and NAT network model for guest connectivity.
outputs: vmbr0, vmbr10, IPv4 forwarding, and guest NAT policy converged on the host.

converge-guest-network-policy.description: Converge the default-deny guest network policy on the Proxmox host and all managed guests.
outputs: Per-VM Proxmox firewall rules, NIC firewall enablement, and guest nftables policies converged from the canonical network policy matrix.
verification_commands: ssh -i /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes ops@100.118.189.95 'sudo pve-firewall compile >/dev/null && sudo ls /etc/pve/firewall/*.fw'

configure-ingress.description: Converge public ingress forwarding from the host to the NGINX edge VM.
outputs: TCP 80 and 443 forwarding from the public host IP to nginx-lv3.

configure-edge-publication.description: Publish repo-managed public hostnames at the NGINX edge.
outputs: NGINX virtual hosts, proxy routes, and edge certificate domains updated on nginx-lv3.

configure-tailscale.description: Converge host Tailscale installation and subnet-router settings.
outputs: Tailscale package, auth state helpers, and advertised guest subnet routing on the host.

provision-guests.description: Provision the Debian cloud template and declared guest VMs on Proxmox.
outputs: Template VM 9000 and declared guest instances created or updated on the Proxmox host.

harden-access.description: Converge the host access baseline for routine non-root operations.
outputs: Host-side SSH, sudo, and Proxmox access baseline enforced for routine operations.

harden-guest-access.description: Converge the Linux guest access baseline for the managed VM fleet.
outputs: Guest SSH and sudo baseline enforced across the managed Linux VMs.

harden-security.description: Converge the Proxmox host security baseline including firewall, notifications, ACME, and TOTP.
outputs: Firewall, ACME certificate, notifications, and TOTP state converged on the Proxmox host.

provision-api-access.description: Create and verify the durable Proxmox API automation identity and token.
outputs: Durable Proxmox API automation user and locally mirrored token payload.

converge-monitoring.description: Converge the monitoring VM, guest telemetry paths, Grafana dashboards, Prometheus service-graph metrics, Tempo tracing, and centralized Loki log shipping.
outputs: Monitoring VM services converged, dashboards imported, guest telemetry wired into InfluxDB, Tempo tracing plus Prometheus service-graph metrics exposed through Grafana, and centralized Loki log shipping active for the host and managed guests.

converge-ntopng.description: Converge host-local ntopng capture on the Proxmox bridges and expose the operator-only Tailscale proxy path.
outputs: Host-local ntopng capture on vmbr10 and vmbr0 plus an operator-only UI on the Proxmox host Tailscale address.
verification_commands: ssh -i /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -o IdentitiesOnly=yes ops@100.118.189.95 'sudo systemctl is-active redis-server ntopng'

converge-docker-runtime.description: Converge the Docker runtime baseline on docker-runtime-lv3.
outputs: Docker Engine, Compose plugin, daemon baseline, and ops group access on docker-runtime-lv3.

converge-postgres-vm.description: Converge the dedicated PostgreSQL guest baseline on postgres-lv3.
outputs: PostgreSQL runtime, guest firewall policy, and local admin baseline converged on postgres-lv3.

converge-mail-platform.description: Converge the Dockerized mail platform, host SMTP ingress, DNS, sender profiles, Grafana mail telemetry, and mail-gateway trace export.
outputs: Mail DNS records, public SMTP forwarding, the Stalwart mail runtime, profile-scoped sender credentials, the private automation API, the dedicated Grafana mail dashboard, and mail-gateway traces into Tempo converged for LV3.

converge-openbao.description: Deploy private OpenBao on docker-runtime-lv3, seed scoped secrets, configure Transit, and enable PostgreSQL dynamic credentials.
outputs: A private OpenBao deployment on docker-runtime-lv3 with controller-local bootstrap artifacts, scoped human and machine auth identities, seeded platform secrets, Transit keys, and PostgreSQL dynamic credentials.

converge-step-ca.description: Deploy the private step-ca runtime, expose it over the host Tailscale path, and enable SSH CA trust on the Proxmox host and managed guests.
outputs: A private step-ca deployment on docker-runtime-lv3, a Tailscale-published CA API on the Proxmox host, controller-local bootstrap artifacts, and CA-backed SSH trust on the Proxmox host and managed guests.

converge-windmill.description: Converge Windmill on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, and expose the operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host.
outputs: Windmill runtime deployed on docker-runtime-lv3 with a PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3 and an operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host.

rotate-secret.description: Plan or apply one repo-managed secret rotation, update the owning service without a full reconverge, and persist the rotated value in OpenBao.
outputs: One named secret rotation planned or applied through the canonical catalog, the owning role-local rotate task, and the dedicated OpenBao path plus metadata.

converge-control-plane-recovery.description: Converge scheduled control-plane backups on docker-runtime-lv3, stage controller recovery references, and validate recurring restore drills on backup-lv3.
outputs: Scheduled runtime exports for step-ca, OpenBao, Windmill, and the mail platform on docker-runtime-lv3 plus backup-lv3 restore drills and a mirrored controller recovery bundle.

converge-keycloak.description: Converge Keycloak on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, publish it at sso.lv3.org, and wire Grafana through the shared SSO broker.
outputs: A repo-managed Keycloak realm on docker-runtime-lv3 with a PostgreSQL backend, the public edge hostname sso.lv3.org, an initial named operator account, an agent confidential client, and Grafana wired to the shared OIDC login flow.

converge-netbox.description: Converge private NetBox on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, publish the host-side Tailscale proxy, and synchronize canonical repo inventory into the API.
outputs: NetBox runtime deployed on docker-runtime-lv3 with a PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, a private Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host, and repo-managed topology and IPAM inventory synchronized into the NetBox API.

converge-open-webui.description: Deploy private Open WebUI on docker-runtime-lv3 with repo-managed bootstrap auth and an operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host.
outputs: A private Open WebUI runtime deployed on docker-runtime-lv3 with repo-managed admin bootstrap and an operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host.

converge-rag-context.description: Deploy the private platform context API with Qdrant on docker-runtime-lv3, publish it through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy, and seed the initial retrieval corpus.
outputs: A private OpenAPI tool server on docker-runtime-lv3 backed by Qdrant, a local embedding model, and a repo-grounded retrieval corpus, published through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy.

converge-portainer.description: Converge the private Portainer runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, publish it through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy, and persist the controller-local bootstrap auth.
outputs: Private Portainer runtime on docker-runtime-lv3 with a Tailscale-published controller URL on the Proxmox host and controller-local bootstrap auth persisted under .local/portainer.

converge-mattermost.description: Converge Mattermost on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, expose the operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host, and seed the repo-managed collaboration channels and incoming webhooks.
outputs: Mattermost runtime deployed on docker-runtime-lv3 with a PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, a Tailscale operator entrypoint on the Proxmox host, seeded LV3 collaboration channels, and incoming webhook routes for alerts and workflow events.

deploy-uptime-kuma.description: Deploy Uptime Kuma on the Docker runtime VM and publish it at uptime.lv3.org.
outputs: Uptime Kuma runtime, public DNS publication, and edge proxy configuration for uptime.lv3.org.

uptime-kuma-manage.description: Run repo-local Uptime Kuma client actions such as bootstrap, ensure-monitors, or list-monitors.
outputs: Repo-managed Uptime Kuma auth bootstrap or monitor state reconciliation against the live service.

portainer-manage.description: Run governed Portainer API actions such as listing containers, reading logs, or restarting one container through the repo-managed wrapper.
outputs: Read-mostly Portainer inspection and bounded runtime actions through the repo-managed wrapper instead of ad hoc Docker shell access.

configure-backup-vm.description: Converge the dedicated backup VM and host-side PBS backup integration.
outputs: backup-lv3 guest, PBS datastore, local API credentials, and Proxmox host backup target configuration.

configure-backups.description: Retained legacy external CIFS backup workflow from ADR 0020.
outputs: Legacy CIFS backup configuration path retained only as a documented blocked workflow.

database-dns.description: Publish the private database.lv3.org DNS record toward the Proxmox Tailscale address.
outputs: database.lv3.org DNS record updated to the private Proxmox host Tailscale address.

check-platform-drift.description: Run the ADR 0071 observation loop checks and emit structured findings from the controller command lane.
outputs: Structured drift findings under .local/platform-observation/latest plus an Open WebUI review digest under .local/open-webui/platform-findings-daily.md.

open-maintenance-window.description: Open one ADR 0080 maintenance window in the private NATS KV bucket before a planned live change.

preferred_entrypoint.command: make open-maintenance-window SERVICE=grafana REASON='planned restart' DURATION_MINUTES=30

outputs: One active maintenance window stored in the private maintenance-windows KV bucket together with a maintenance.opened event on the internal event bus.
verification_commands: uv run --with pyyaml --with nats-py python scripts/maintenance_window_tool.py list

close-maintenance-window.description: Close one ADR 0080 maintenance window and emit the matching maintenance.closed or maintenance.force_closed event.
outputs: The targeted maintenance window is removed from the private maintenance-windows KV bucket and a close event is emitted on the internal event bus.
verification_commands: uv run --with pyyaml --with nats-py python scripts/maintenance_window_tool.py list
